description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a sleek, rectangular silhouette and a minimalist design. The upholstery is a smooth, dark material, likely leather or faux leather, giving it a sophisticated and slightly glossy appearance. The sofa features three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are straight, flat, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's clean lines. The legs are short, cylindrical, and made of wood, slightly visible beneath the base, providing subtle contrast to the dark upholstery. Overall, the sofa exudes a contemporary urban style suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, dark-colored three-seater sofa with smooth upholstery, straight armrests, and wooden legs, featuring three large seat and back cushions. Its minimalist design and subtle gloss make it ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, flat armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the armrest and cushion depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose backrest cushions, all uniform in size and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat armrests at the same height as the backrest, rectangular profile, no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical wooden legs positioned at the corners, slightly exposed beneath the base, with a simple, unadorned finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three loose, uniform cushions, continuous and unsegmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth, dark upholstery with a subtle glossy finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
